query:
UPDATE patients SET
            nationality = COALESCE($2, nationality),
            height_cm   = COALESCE($3, height_cm),
            weight_kg   = COALESCE($4, weight_kg),
            bmi         = CASE WHEN $3 IS NOT NULL AND $4 IS NOT NULL THEN $5 ELSE bmi END,
            updated_at  = NOW()
        WHERE id = $1
